value.name: BERT
value.description: A bidirectional encoder-transformer language model pretrained on masked language modeling and next sentence prediction. It uses token, position, and segment embeddings passed through L transformer encoder blocks.
value.novelty_vs_prior: Introduced by Devlin et al. (2018) as a foundational self-supervised language model.

value.name: Co-Attentional Transformer Layer (Co-TRM)
value.description: A novel layer where the key and value matrices from the visual stream are used by the linguistic stream's attention mechanism, and vice versa. This allows each modality to attend to features from the other modality at specific depths within the two-stream architecture.
value.key_formula: H_V^{(i+k)} = \text{Transformer}_{linguistic \to visual}(H_V^{(i)}, H_W^{(j)}) \\ H_W^{(j+k)} = \text{Transformer}_{visual \to linguistic}(H_W^{(j)}, H_V^{(i)})
value.novelty_vs_prior: Proposed in this paper. While co-attention exists in prior vision-language work, this specific integration into a BERT-style parallel transformer stack for pretraining is the novel contribution.

value.name: Masked Multi-Modal Modelling
value.description: A pretraining task analogous to BERT's masked language modeling. Approximately 15% of words and image regions are masked. Words are masked randomly or replaced with MASK tokens. Image regions have their features zeroed out. The model predicts the semantic class distribution for masked regions using KL divergence against the detector's output, and cross-entropy for words.
value.novelty_vs_prior: Adapted from BERT's MLM for the multimodal setting. The use of KL divergence against a detection model's output distribution for image regions is a specific modification for this paper.

value.name: Multi-Modal Alignment Prediction
value.description: A pretraining task where the model predicts whether an image and text pair are aligned (from the same source). Holistic representations h_IMG and h_CLS are combined via element-wise product, followed by a linear classifier and binary cross-entropy loss. Negatives are generated by pairing an image with a random caption or vice versa.
value.novelty_vs_prior: Analogous to BERT's Next Sentence Prediction (NSP). The specific combination of image and text CLS/IMG tokens via element-wise product for alignment scoring is tailored for this work.

value.name: Faster R-CNN Region Extraction
value.description: Uses a pre-trained Faster R-CNN with ResNet-101 backbone to extract bounding boxes and mean-pooled convolutional features for up to 36 high-scoring regions per image. Spatial locations are encoded as 5-d vectors added to the visual features.
value.novelty_vs_prior: Standard object detection pipeline (Girshick et al., He et al.) used here as a feature extractor.
